overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long NIO Daily ETF (NIOG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of NIO, Inc. (NYSE: NIO) stock, less fees, and expenses NIOG was launched on Dec 18, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
